game.resumeNote: You can still edit scores after ending the game.
game.tovStlNeutralHint: TOV←team violation / STL→right for team GDF
game.pendingPlayerStatHint: #{num} → TOV tap: personal / STL tap: opponent #
game.neutralTeamTovHint: Which team committed the turnover? (then pick player # + reason)
game.neutralTeamStlHint: Which team got the steal? (logs team STL with no player)
game.shotResultHint: #{num} right made left miss · double-tap to change 2PT/3PT/FT
game.foulGestureHint: #{num} → swipe Foul (up P, down U/T, left P1, right P2)
game.myTeamHint: Tap "Set as my team" on your team. My team appears at the bottom with a blue frame in the game
game.myTeamLocked: Cannot change my team after stats are logged
game.stlLongPressVictimHint: STL hold: tap opponent turnover # (personal STL + team GDF)
game.stlPressureSwipeLegend: Hold STL→right: trap pass cut (no stealer #)
game.stlPressureCauseHint: Pass out under double-team, then cut
game.stlLongPressHint: Pass-cut moved here. Defense logs personal STL; offense logs team TOV
game.teamDefCauseHint: Track 24/8/5 sec, pass pressure, backcourt, and other violations separately
game.noPlayersHint: Add players using the input below
game.rosterSetupHint: Enter a jersey number or import your saved team roster
game.errorWhiteRequired: Please enter the light team name
game.errorDarkRequired: Please enter the dark team name

features.aiDesc: Gemini analyzes your game data and generates coach-level reports. Results are cached.

scoreSheet.title: Basketball Score Sheet
scoreSheet.abbrev: PTS=Points / 2PM·2PA=2PT Made·Att / 3PM·3PA=3PT Made·Att / FTM·FTA=FT Made·Att / OR=Off. Reb / DR=Def. Reb / AST=Assist / STL=Steal / BLK=Block / TOV=Turnover / FOUL=Foul / GDF=Good Defense Forced Turnover

guide.title: User Guide
guide.step1Card1Desc: Tap "Create New Game" at the bottom of the home screen
guide.step1FieldMyTeamVal: Choose white or dark as my team. Shown at bottom with blue border in game
guide.step1FieldOurTeamVal: Name of the white jersey team
guide.step1FieldTheirTeamVal: Name of the dark jersey team
guide.step2Card1Desc: Tap "Substitution" next to the team name in the recording screen
guide.step2Hint: First 5 players are placed on court. Players 6+ are on bench.
guide.step2Card2Desc: Tap "Sub" → pick players to swap. The sheet stays open for consecutive subs. Tap "Done" to close
guide.step3Step1Desc: Select a player from the team cards above/below
guide.step3Step2Desc: Tap ORbd, AST, Foul, TOV, etc. in the center panel
guide.step3Step3Desc: Some stats need an extra step: shot swipe, Foul swipe, or STL victim selection
guide.step3ShotFlowDesc: # → swipe right 2PT / left 3PT / up FT → right made / left miss. 2PT/3PT open the court map. Double-tap the same # before made/miss to change shot type
guide.step3FoulFlowDesc: Tap a player # and P/P1/P2/U/T labels appear on the Foul button immediately. Swipe the button to confirm (up P, down U/T, left P1, right P2)
guide.step3CourtMapDesc: After 2PT/3PT made or miss, tap the court zone on the map
guide.step3StlLinkDesc: # (stealer) → tap STL → opponent # → pass/dribble. Pass = bad pass, dribble = lost ball. Linked TOV recorded; undo is paired.
guide.step3StlPressure: STL swipe right (team GDF — pressure cut)
guide.step3StlPressureDesc: Swipe STL right (cyan dashed) without selecting a stealer #. Use when double-team pressure forced a bad pass that was cut. Pick turnover # → pass/dribble. Logs team STL + linked TOV, counted as team GDF.
guide.step3TeamTov: TOV swipe left (team TOV — time violations)
guide.step3TeamTovDesc: Swipe TOV left (sky dashed) for turnovers without a steal. Pick turnover # → 24/8/5 sec, backcourt, etc. Selecting '5-sec violation' or 'pass pressure' also adds a GDF count.
guide.step3GdfDesc: GDF (Good Defense Forced Turnover) counts turnovers that the defense actively forced — separate from self-inflicted turnovers like shot-clock violations or traveling. Visualizing this split is a core feature of this app.
guide.step3GdfReasons: Turnover reasons that count as GDF
guide.step3GdfReasonItems: bad-pass (pressure-forced pass error) · steal (direct steal) · offensive-foul (charging) · 5sec (5-second violation)
guide.step3GdfHow2: TOV swipe left → turnover # → select 5-sec or pass pressure
guide.step3GdfDisplayDesc: GDF count appears in green next to the team TOV number. The TOV breakdown section uses green for GDF-forced and orange for unforced turnovers.
guide.step3ColorLegendDesc: Blue = normal tap. Violet = STL (individual → linked opponent TOV). Cyan dashed = STL swipe right (team GDF). Sky dashed = TOV swipe left (team TOV). Amber = Foul swipe. Green = score swipe.
guide.step3TovFlowDesc: # → TOV → (Detailed mode) pick a category. PRO defaults to Detailed recording.
guide.step3TeamFoulDesc: Resets each quarter. From the 4th team foul, all indicators turn red
guide.step3TimelineDesc: The bottom shows the latest 2 entries. When there are 3 or more, tap "View all" to see and undo every entry
guide.step3UndoDesc: Tap × on a row to undo. STL and linked TOV are removed together. Use the full timeline page for older entries
guide.step4RunningDesc: Tap the clipboard icon in the header. Three columns: 1–50, 51–100, 101–150, color-coded by quarter
guide.step4StatsDesc: Tap the chart icon in the header. View complete stats by player and team.
guide.step4QuarterHint: Tap a Q button in the header to switch. You can go back to a past quarter to add scores.
guide.step5Card1Desc: Tap "End" in the header. Final score and quarter-by-quarter breakdown are shown.
guide.step5RunningVal: View point-by-point progress color-coded by quarter
guide.step5StatsDetailVal: Complete stats by player and team
guide.step5PdfVal: Save or print the score sheet as PDF (PRO)
guide.step5ImageVal: Save the score sheet preview as an image on your device (easy to share)
guide.step5ResumeVal: Edit or add scores even after ending
guide.premiumTovDesc: A mode toggle (Simple / Detailed PRO) appears above the TOV buttons in the stats panel.
guide.premiumTovModeSimpleDesc: Logs TOV immediately on button tap (default behavior)
guide.premiumTovModeDetailDesc: Bad Pass, Lost Ball, OOB, Double Dribble, 24-sec, etc. — 12 categories for detailed recording. PRO users start with Detailed selected
guide.cloudUploadTitle: Finish a game and send to cloud (phone)
guide.cloudUploadAuto: While logged in, your game is saved to the cloud when you leave the stats screen (e.g. go home or open the running score sheet) and when you end the game.
guide.cloudUploadManual: Tap "Send to Cloud" on the end screen to confirm the final save.
guide.cloudDownloadTitle: View data on PC or another device
guide.cloudDownloadBody: On the home screen, tap "Fetch Latest from Cloud" to download the latest games sent from your phone. Scores and heatmaps will update on this device.
guide.cloudDirectionNote: "Send to Cloud" uploads data. "Fetch Latest from Cloud" downloads data.
guide.cloudTransferTitle: Send game data to another account
guide.cloudTransferSend: Tap "Send" on a game card on Home and enter the recipient's email. Only games saved to the cloud can be sent. They appear in the recipient's list after acceptance
guide.cloudTransferReceive: Use Accept or Ignore on the banner at the top of Home. On the free plan, if your game limit is full, delete one game first, then accept
guide.guestModeDesc: Tap "Try as guest" on the login screen to record one game. When you sign up or sign in, your game is transferred to your account for cloud sync and more games (transfers require an account)
guide.collabDesc: Multiple people share recording roles using the same account and merge data after the game. Requires Wi-Fi.
guide.collab1Desc: Tap the 👥 button in the game header → Copy the URL for each role → Share with teammates (via message, AirDrop, etc.)
guide.collab2Desc: Open the shared URL in a browser (must be logged in with the same account). A dedicated UI shows only the buttons for your assigned role
guide.collabRoleTovDesc: Steals & Turnovers (STL and GDF handled by this role)
guide.collabRoleDefDesc: BLK · Fouls (STL is handled by the TOV/STL role)
guide.collab3Desc: Master taps 👥 → Get Latest Logs. All workers logs are fetched from Supabase at once and the game can be ended with fully integrated stats
guide.collabTipTitle: Tip: When Master Also Records Stats
guide.collabTipDesc: Use the PWA (home screen app) for master control, and open ?role=pts etc. in a browser for your assigned role UI. PWA and browser run as independent windows simultaneously
guide.collabNote1: Everyone must be logged in with the same account
guide.collabNote2: Each person's input saves to the cloud in real time (Wi-Fi required)
guide.collabNote3: Only the master should press the End Game button

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.sec1Body: Basketball Score (the "App") is an app for recording basketball game scores and stats in real time. This policy explains what information we collect and how we use it.
privacy.sec2Item1Val: Email address (used for sign-in and registration)
privacy.sec2Item2Val: Scores, stats, team names, player jersey numbers
privacy.sec2Item3Val: Premium plan purchases are processed by Stripe. The App does not store card details.
privacy.sec3Item2: Cloud storage of game records and multi-device sync
privacy.sec5Body: Data is stored on encrypted cloud servers (Japan region). Local data is stored in your device's storage.
privacy.sec6Body: To request deletion of your account or data, please contact support.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.sec1Body: By using Basketball Score (the "App"), you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the App.
terms.sec2Body: The App provides basketball game recording and analysis services. Both a free plan and a paid Premium plan are available.
terms.sec3Item1: The Premium plan is a monthly or annual subscription
terms.sec3Item3: Subscriptions can be cancelled at any time
terms.sec3Item4: Refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis — please contact us
terms.sec4Item1: Unauthorized use or reverse engineering of the App
terms.sec4Item2: Unauthorized access to other users' data
terms.sec4Item3: Any illegal activities through the App
terms.sec5Body: The App is provided "as is." We are not responsible for data loss or service interruptions. We recommend backing up important data regularly.
terms.sec6Body: We may modify or terminate the service without prior notice.
terms.sec7Body: For details on the seller, pricing, and payment methods, see our

legal.title: Specified Commercial Transactions
legal.addressVal: Will be provided promptly upon request via email
legal.productVal: Basketball Score Premium Plan (digital service license)
legal.priceVal: Price shown in the app (tax included)
legal.extraFeesVal: Internet connection fees and other telecommunication costs
legal.paymentTimingVal: Charged at first purchase. Subsequent charges on the same date each month.
legal.deliveryVal: Access granted immediately after payment completion
legal.returnsVal: No refunds on digital content. Subscriptions can be cancelled from account settings. Service continues until end of current billing period. No pro-rata refunds.

collab.shareHint: Copy the URL and have each person open it on their device
